programme.title: Caddyshack 2
programme.desc: A real estate tycoon vows revenge when his membership in a luxurious club is rejected So he strikes back by buying the club and turning it into an amusement park

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Hong 103
programme.desc: Hong 103

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Forgotten Gunners Of WWI
programme.desc: The team explores the grounds around Belton House near Grantham which were home to thousands of men training for frontline duties in WWI

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: Vietnam Nurses is a 2005 television documentary directed by Polly Watkins It tells the story of six Australian Army nurses who served in a field hospital in Vietnam between the years 1962 and 1972

programme.title: Tornado Down
programme.desc: Operation Desert Storm was only a day old when Tornado pilots John Peters and John Nichol were shot down in Iraqi territory and subsequently tortured and paraded on TV Bruised and battered the two men mumbled incoherently into the camera and instantly became symbols around the world of Saddam’s savagery and aggression In Tornado Down the two pilots break their silence and in a series of moving and candid interviews reveal the physical and psychological torment they suffered at the hands of their captors; the brutal torture sessions; the elation of their release; and their determination not to crack in the face of such cruelty and humiliation

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 1
programme.desc: Part 1 Dien Bien Phu - The Legacy

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt4
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Janet is married to a doctor whos married to his work She wants to live her life with passion danger and romance like Fuchsia Monroe a soap opera character she watches religiously When her television goes haywire her friend Louise convinces her to get cable With her husband unresponsive to her needs she begins a steamy affair with the cable guy

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Two con artist attempt to steal the fortune of a rich man they accidentally killed by creating a fake seance for his blind wife but not everything goes to plan

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A cursed antique harp becomes the motive for murder and the focus of Nicks investigation

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: Mchale 336
programme.desc: Mchale 336

programme.title: Mchale 404
programme.desc: Mchale 404

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate is expecting some women from the Garden Club to visit and is nervous about them asking her to join Of course Grampa makes the wrong impression and Kate is sure that she will not get the invite

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A new female neighbor makes a bad impression on Grampa by being better than him at almost everything

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is investigating a madman who is blowing up high-rise buildings though CONTROL is not sure how he is doing it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Agent 86 has amnesia after he hears about a KAOS plot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Cindy and Stacks go undercover at a gymnasium linked to a series of baffling burglaries most recently one that netted a 400000 painting entrusted to Bear Enterprises Detective Finger a cross between Columbo and Clouseau joins BJ in cracking the case

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans 310
programme.desc: Hogans 310

programme.title: Hogans 303
programme.desc: Hogans 303

programme.title: WKRP 215
programme.desc: WKRP 215

programme.title: WKRP 101
programme.desc: WKRP 101

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor and Aimee Hilary Swajk elope and get married

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: In the series pilot Wood Newton a former NFL football player and the head coach of the local high school football team has to deal with his teams losing streak and the possible pregnancy of his wife

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Faded singer Ginny Gordons comeback is threatened and her sanity imperiled by attempts on her life Is her former partner responsible for the attempts or is a recent acquaintance terrorizing her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Its roundup time at the Harts ranch but Jonathan and Jennifer are distracted by dying animals a rumored chemical spill and a murder

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Georges 40-year high school reunion gives him the chance to admit his feelings to an old crush

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael steals an idea for a new program from a new student at his television production class

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: MacGillis is starting to tire of going out every night on the campaign trail with Polly but sticks with it as election night draws near Gunny Holowachuk and General Craig deal with a huge overstock of rations while the Major is out

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Wrongway Feldman returns to the island not to rescue the castaways but to make the island his permanent home As a result the castaways try to trick him into returning to Hawaii and rescuing them

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Griff and Ryan investigate a series of vicious murders which were committed by a half-human half-fish woman known as Silver Eyes who is looking to procreate with a man

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Rusty leads Sonia and Ronnie on a wild goose chase Sonia loses her cool and puts her foot down with Lou

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The teams work with anger management starts to pay off - with disastrous consequences Matt and Sonia get into a standoff with a wealthy divorcee his daughter and her raging boyfriend

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A rock singer tries to run away from the consequences of the morbid overtones in the lyrics of his songs after two fans committ suicide to the suggestions therein

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Can Will escape the wrath of guardians to a lost Mayan temple within the swamp when he is forced to be an unwilling guide

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig is transported to another world and another time Once there he finds that he has to choose between returning to his life and companions on the moon and the love of a beautiful girl

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into a town looking for a job He runs into a hired killer he knows who tries to kill him but is shot by the local sheriff Once he learns who the man was the sheriff hires Cheyenne to work undercover to find who hired him

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody is asked to join a group of traveling actors unknowingly taking part in a plot to assassinate a US general

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After one of his fellow teachers is killed on the schoolyard during a fight between two students a veteran former teacher kidnaps four troublesome students and holds them in an abandoned private school where he chains them while he forces them to read history lessons

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis one of the countrys richest financier

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A wounded robber is suspected of murder and forces Kimble to treat him but Kimble doesnt believe he killed anyone

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Killdozer
programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Isaiah Burkhalter at HK52.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Stephen Whitall v. Jp Shortall

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Luiz Rocha v. Myrza Tebuev

programme.title: The Harold Vann II Interview
programme.desc: Hear the riveting story of a preacher whose promiscuous life almost destroyed him

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss
